name: Court Wizard Mantle
description: Mages who find themself a part of a noble court are a subject of envy. The life they lead is comfy, lucrative, and devoid of any real dangers - that is until their master decides to participate in a military campaign...
descriptionZh: 法师若能得到领主供养，成为家内法师，就会成为他人艳羡的对象。他们衣食无忧，收入丰厚，而且没有性命之忧。不过，倘若主人某日决定率军参战……
